pageContext.name: Rei Ayanami Ver.RADIO EVA Part.2 Original Color
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Hobbymax are proud to present the Rei Ayanami Ver.RADIO EVA Part 2 Original Color Collectible Figure by HOBBYMAX. This line of figures is based on illustrations made by Mai Yoneyama for the lifestyle and clothing brand Radio Eva. Modelling the fashion, Rei Ayanami stands approximately 9.84' tall, in this original color version that presents her with the same primarily black-and-white color scheme as seen in the illustration.
